So, the boat can't carry more than the farmer and one item. So, if he takes two items, the boat will be too heavy and it will sink. But the problem says that if the fox is left alone, it will eat the chicken. If the chicken is left alone, it will eat the grain. So, the farmer needs to get all three across safely. So, how?
